title: Campaign Schema
description: Canonical JSON structure for campaign state stored in dc_campaigns.campaign_data. Tracks campaign ownership, start status, progress history, and current location state.

schema_version.description: Semantic version for schema migration compatibility (e.g., '1.0.0').

created_by.description: Drupal user ID of the user who created this campaign.

started.description: Whether the campaign has started (true) or is still in draft/setup (false).

progress.description: Chronologically ordered campaign progress markers/events. Each entry records significant campaign milestones such as quest starts, location discoveries, or combat outcomes.

active_hex.description: Current hex location key in axial coordinate format (e.g., 'q0r0', 'q2r-1'). Null/undefined if no active location.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the campaign was created.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the campaign was last updated.

metadata.description: Optional campaign metadata for storing additional game state, custom flags, or campaign-specific configuration.

progress_event.description: A single campaign progress event recording a significant milestone or action.

type.description: Progress event type identifier. Standardized event types for consistent tracking.

timestamp.description: Unix timestamp (seconds since epoch) when this event was recorded.

payload.description: Optional event-specific details. Structure varies by event type. Examples: {quest_id: 'abc', quest_name: 'Dragon Hunt'}, {location_id: 'xyz', hex: 'q2r-1'}, {encounter_id: '123', xp_awarded: 500}
